chapter_goal: Make Moser's theorem visible as a cancellation equation plus a nondegeneracy gate.

library_routing.why: the lecture distinguishes several equivalence notions and hypotheses
a sampled local model makes the pointwise linear equation inspectable
the zero contour shows exactly where the theorem's hypothesis breaks

visual_sequence.inspection_target: fixed cohomology, closedness, and nondegeneracy each supply one step
arrows solve the pointwise Moser equation
zero contour marks where omega_t cannot be inverted
success and failure checks are both recorded
